observations: c091_feature_calibrator_w14 visually matches c089-level broad green-character control but does not improve it.
c091_feature_calibrator_w10 is unstable and includes a low-variance collapsed output on crop_pair00.
c087_expanded_crop_positive_w14 remains clearly stronger for hard-shape/non-human references.
Heldout side-profile monster and exact chibi/frog body proportions remain unresolved.
